visual_mood: Clean product showcase with educational callouts -- the Outback Red as hero against a warm neutral backdrop, features labeled with sleek arrows

layout.composition: Product centered at 45% of frame. 4 callout labels with thin arrows: top-left points to lenses, top-right points to frame temple, bottom-left points to hinge area, bottom-right points to nose bridge. Headline at top center. Logo bottom-right.
layout.text_hierarchy: Headline largest, feature labels medium bold, feature descriptions small
layout.background: Warm sandy beige gradient, clean and minimal

product.placement: Centered in the frame at a 3/4 angle, arms slightly open, resting naturally on an invisible surface with a soft contact shadow beneath
product.instruction: The sunglasses should look like a real pair photographed in this scene -- matching the style shown in the reference image. Not a digital composite or 3D render.

brand.color_scheme: Warm sandy beige background, headline and labels in black (#1A1A1A), feature descriptions in dark gray, red (#E31E24) accent on callout arrows and label underlines

prompt: A clean product infographic on a warm sandy beige gradient background. Outback Red sunglasses from DuberyMNL sit centered at a 3/4 angle -- real matte sunglasses matching the reference image, photographed with natural shadow beneath, not a digital composite or render. All text uses the bold italic sporty typeface shown in the font reference image. Large headline 'PROTECTION YOU CAN SEE THROUGH' at the top in black. Four callout labels with thin red arrows point to features: 'POLARIZED LENSES' and 'UV400 PROTECTION' above, 'DURABLE HINGES' and 'LIGHTWEIGHT FRAME' below, each with a short description line underneath. DuberyMNL logo matching the logo reference in the bottom-right corner. 4:5 aspect ratio, clean minimal design.
